case_title: TANCREDI VINCENT JOSEPH DBA S F RESTAURANT SUPPLY VS BRUNO JOHN DBA GIANNI'S PIZZA PASTA CAFE'

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,408.45 FILED BY TANCREDI VINCENT JOSEPH DBA S F RESTAURANT SUPPLY AS TO DEFENDANT BRUNO JOHN DBA GIANNI'S PIZZA PASTA  CAFE' ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUN-17-1992 AT 08:00 AM IN DEPT 04
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT BRUNO JOHN DBA GIANNI'S PIZZA PASTA  CAFE'

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF TANCREDI VINCENT JOSEPH DBA S F RESTAURANT SUPPLY RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT BRUNO JOHN DBA GIANNI'S PIZZA PASTA  CAFE' $1,408.45 PRINCIPAL, $29.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,437.45, $1408.45 INCLUDES $500.00 PENALTY FOR ISSUING NSF CHECKS. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT AS TO DEFENDANT BRUNO JOHN DBA GIANNI'S PIZZA PASTA  CAFE'
